title: ophrys × phryganae var. hellenica
intro: Ophrys × phryganae var. hellenica, also known as the Greek bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species belonging to the Ophrys genus, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. Traditionally, this plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and inflammation, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × phryganae var. hellenica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
